action.reasoning: Observation: first baseline is valid (test balanced_accuracy 0.403) and training/validation curves are still improving after only 2 epochs, but source val_bal_acc (0.72) is much higher than held-out L100, indicating domain shift. Analysis: the quickest likely gain is to continue the same strong pretrained CLIP model longer with source-balanced sampling while adding more domain-randomizing augmentation and saving richer checkpoint metadata; this is low risk and fits measured time (~2.5 min/epoch + eval overhead). Decision: update training to support stronger RandAugment/blur, EMA, and train 6 epochs, then submit eval to measure whether longer training improves hidden balanced accuracy.
